questions.text: Find the greatest number which when divides 152, 277, and 427 leaves the same remainder in each case.
If $x + \frac{1}{x} = 2\sqrt{5}$, find the value of $x^3 - \frac{1}{x^3}$ (assuming $x > 1$).
If $\sec\theta + \tan\theta = 5$, find the value of $\sin\theta$.

In a circle with center $O$, $AB$ and $CD$ are two parallel chords on opposite sides of the center. If $AB = 10\text{ cm}$, $CD = 24\text{ cm}$, and the radius of the circle is $13\text{ cm}$, find the distance between the two chords.
A shopkeeper marks an article 50% above the cost price and gives a discount of 20%. If he earns a profit of Rs. 400, find the marked price of the article.
A can do a piece of work in 20 days and B can do it in 30 days. They work together for 6 days, then A leaves. B finishes the remaining work alone. For how many total days did B work?
A train traveling at $60\text{ km/h}$ crosses a man running in the same direction at $6\text{ km/h}$ in 10 seconds. Find the length of the train.
A sum of money amounts to Rs. 8,820 in 2 years and Rs. 9,261 in 3 years at compound interest, compounded annually. Find the principal sum.
A solid metallic cone of radius $6\text{ cm}$ and height $24\text{ cm}$ is melted to form a solid sphere. Find the radius of the sphere.
The average of 10 numbers is 72. The average of the first 4 numbers is 69 and that of the next 5 numbers is 74. What is the 10th number?
The ratio of copper and zinc in brass is 13:7. How much zinc will be there in $100\text{ kg}$ of brass?
In an election, 20% of the cast votes were declared invalid. The winning candidate got 60% of the valid votes and won by a margin of 3200 votes. Find the total number of votes cast.
A mixture contains milk and water in the ratio 5:3. If 16 liters of water is added to the mixture, the ratio becomes 3:5. Find the initial quantity of milk.
In $\triangle ABC$, $AB = 8\text{ cm}$ and $AC = 12\text{ cm}$. The angle bisector of $\angle A$ meets $BC$ at $D$. If $BD = 6\text{ cm}$, find the length of $DC$.
If $a^3 + b^3 = 405$ and $a + b = 9$, find the value of $ab$.
Evaluate the expression: $$\frac{\sin^2 30^\circ + \cos^2 60^\circ - \sec^2 45^\circ}{\tan^2 60^\circ + \cot^2 30^\circ}$$
A boat goes $24\text{ km}$ upstream and $36\text{ km}$ downstream in 6 hours. It goes $36\text{ km}$ upstream and $24\text{ km}$ downstream in 6.5 hours. What is the speed of the current?
The area of a rhombus is $216\text{ cm}^2$ and one of its diagonals is $24\text{ cm}$. Find the perimeter of the rhombus.
What is the remainder when $13^{15} + 15$ is divided by 14?
From an external point $P$, two tangents $PA$ and $PB$ are drawn to a circle with center $O$. If $\angle APB = 64^\circ$, what is the measure of $\angle OAB$?
If $x^2 + y^2 + z^2 + 14 = 2(x - 2y + 3z)$, find the value of $x + y + z$.

Pipe A can fill an empty tank in 15 hours, and Pipe B can fill it in 20 hours. Pipe C can empty the full tank in 30 hours. If all three pipes are opened together, how long will it take to completely fill the tank?
A dishonest dealer promises to sell his goods at cost price, but he uses a false weight of $850\text{ grams}$ instead of $1\text{ kg}$. Find his gain percentage.
Find the value of: $$\cos 1^\circ \cos 2^\circ \cos 3^\circ \dots \cos 100^\circ$$

A, B, and C started a business by investing Rs. 40,000, Rs. 48,000, and Rs. 80,000 respectively. After 6 months, A withdrew Rs. 10,000, B invested Rs. 12,000 more, and C withdrew Rs. 20,000. What is the ratio of their profits at the end of the year?
